title: campyloneurum oxypholis
intro: Campyloneurum oxypholis, also known as the Brazilian fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of the plant are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is used to treat conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and wounds.
